title: V-Bucks
body:
# V-Bucks mod
Adds V-Bucks.

![preview](https://gitgud.io/deltanedas/vbucks/-/raw/mc_1.16/preview.png)

To get started, mine Vinderium Ore, which is roughly as rare as Diamond.

Craft its chunks into Vinderium Blocks and smelt them into V-Buck shards.

Work your way up to crafting full blown V-Bucks (has a glowing version)
